scripts.web: pnpm run build:web && deno run -A web/server.ts
scripts._dev:cleanup: sh -c 'for port in ${WOOZI_WEB_PORT:-4317} ${WOOZI_API_PORT:-8787}; do pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; sleep 1; fi; done'
scripts._dev:cleanup:web: sh -c 'pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:${WOOZI_WEB_PORT:-4317} -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; sleep 1; fi'
scripts.dev:docker: pnpm run dev:docker-api && pnpm run _dev:cleanup:web && WOOZI_API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:${WOOZI_API_PORT:-8787} pnpm run dev:web
scripts.format: oxfmt --write src tests web/src/*.ts web/*.html web/*.css vite.config.ts tsconfig.json
scripts.check-format: oxfmt --check src tests web/src/*.ts web/*.html web/*.css vite.config.ts tsconfig.json
